plugins.name: mails-bridge
plugins.description: Connect all your email inboxes to Claude — Gmail, Outlook, Yahoo, iCloud, or any email provider that supports IMAP/SMTP. Add unlimited accounts, and Claude auto-detects the server settings from your email address. Setup takes 2 minutes: generate an App Password, share it with Claude, done. Search across inboxes, read and reply to messages, draft emails, organize with folders and stars — all from one conversation. Works great in Cowork for morning inbox briefings, cross-account searches, and batch email workflows.
